name: Vexar Scalefoot
sd_appearance: A wiry Kobold standing at 2.5 feet, his mottled green-brown scales shimmer like wet bark, with a long snout and twitching tail that betrays his restless anxiety, his sharp, gold-flecked eyes gleaming behind a cracked pair of spectacles balanced on his snout. His leather-wrapped chainmail is scuffed with soot and ink stains, adorned with a tarnished Wizards Tower badge, while a crossbow slung across his back and a warhammer strapped to his thigh hint at his dual role as scholar and enforcer. One clawed hand clutches a brittle, bloodstained tome, its pages fraying at the edges as if the very magic within threatens to consume him.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
